---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Operant
title: ''
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Is this related to a problem?

Describe the problem you are trying to solve. For example: "I often need to [task], but it takes [time]" or "I wish Operant could [capability]."

## Proposed solution

Describe what you would like Operant to do. Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives you have considered

Are there workarounds or other ways to solve this?

## Which mode should this support?

- [ ] Default mode only (zero-code, no jargon)
- [ ] Advanced mode only (developer/power-user features)
- [ ] Both (default-mode users and advanced users should benefit)
- [ ] Unsure

If you propose changes to the UI, remember that default mode is the design bar: no jargon, no DSL, no internal terms. Advanced mode is the escape hatch for developers.

## Additional context

Sketches, mockups, research, or links to related issues or discussions?

## Examples

If this is about a new workflow or adapter, describe a concrete example:
- "Fetch invoice from email, extract data, paste into QuickBooks, save"
- "Read PDF table, copy to spreadsheet, sort by date"

Does this already work with Operant? If yes, what would the feature add?
